programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: The $500 million West Bollsta oil rig travels from South Korea to Europe, aided by the ALP Striker tug.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: The world's largest radio telescope antennas are relocated to Chile's Atacama Desert, facing harsh conditions.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: The Hoegh Trapper, the largest car transporter, carries 8,000 vehicles, overcoming Panama Canal bottlenecks.

programme.title: Mighty Cruise Ships
programme.desc: Celebrity Solstice cruises Australia's coast in luxury, navigating tough shores and tropical heat.

programme.title: Mighty Cruise Ships
programme.desc: Stella Australis explores remote South America, braving wild seas, glaciers, and shifting routes.

programme.title: Mighty Cruise Ships
programme.desc: Gauguin explores French Polynesia's beauty, luxury, and adventure in the stunning series premiere.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: A 2,000-ton wind farm cargo is shipped from Europe to Taiwan on a heavy lift vessel, adding a deck.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: Transporting a giant bulldozer to gold mines in Russia's Kolymar range through harsh winter.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: The team navigates rough lanes, old bridges, and a change of plan to move a 390-tonne generator.

programme.title: Steel Monsters
programme.desc: Bison recovery vehicles tow heavy gear in war zones using winches, pulleys, and armored power.

programme.title: Steel Monsters
programme.desc: The Antonov 225, world's largest aircraft, hauls 150-ton loads over Andes despite its age.

programme.title: Steel Monsters
programme.desc: Germany's M60 conveyor bridge moves 90,000 tons daily, powering 10% of the nation's electricity.

programme.title: Rocket Science
programme.sub-title: The Success Story of Ariane 5 - Part 1
programme.desc: With raw power and flawless precision, Ariane 5 carries Europe’s dreams into orbit.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering
programme.desc: Inside Airbus Bavaria, see how lifesaving H145 rescue helicopters take flight.
